description: Building a scalable educational platform and integrating AI-powered apparel customization using React and Next.js.
Developed high-performance React & Next.js applications, translated Figma designs into responsive interfaces, and integrated REST APIs within an Agile team.
Built mobile-first applications, created reusable UI components, and collaborated using Git & GitHub workflows.
Developed CRUD applications and RESTful APIs using PHP and MySQL with secure server-side validation.
Designed responsive landing pages and completed client projects while learning freelancing fundamentals.
